author: Peyton Tolbert
name: Model Stack BitNet MLP2304 + Overtone Embeddings, SP1024
blurb: Best Model Stack BitNet-compatible Parameter Golf run so far: runtime-row packed BitNet QAT, fused QKV FlashAttention, parallel Muon, dense training backward, 2304-wide ReLU2 MLP, and overtone spectral embedding initialization. Fits the 16MB budget as a Model Stack BitNet bundle plus code.
technique_summary: Model Stack TrainableBitNetLinear QAT + runtime-row packed export + MLP_HIDDEN_DIM=2304 + overtone spectral embedding init + fused QKV + FlashAttention + parallel Muon
